payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden dresser with multiple horizontal drawers and metal drawer pulls, traditional molded trim and polished wood grain; the right-side of the piece is visible and edge-cropped in the image and the left portion is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground; appears to be roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.
